name: Beer-be-Cued Chicken-Perdue
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sauce by combining the beer, dark molasses, onion juice, lemon juice, ketchup, and salt in a bowl.
2. Marinate the chicken in the sauce overnight.
3. Cook on an outdoor grill for approximately 1 hour or until done, turning and basting with the sauce every 10-15 minutes.
